'''Ithull''' was the gigantic [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Ithullan]]s and the [[Colossus wasp/Legends|colossus wasps]]. The Ithullans were almost [[Mandalorian–Ithullan war|wiped out]] by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[200 BBY/Legends|200 BBY]].

Ithull had a 25-[[Standard month/Legends|month]] year.

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The description of Ithull as "immense" in the ''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]'', and the capacity of the colussus wasp to withstand intense pressures strongly suggests, but does not confirm, that the world was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]].

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi 4|''Tales of the Jedi'' 4]] {{Mo}}
